title: ferray-numpy-interop: no bool support for NumPy interop
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NpElement is not implemented for bool. Arrow and Polars have separate ToArrowBool/FromArrowBool and ToPolarsBool/FromPolarsBool traits because bool requires special handling (Arrow bit-packs, Polars uses BooleanChunked). NumPy bool arrays are byte-packed (one byte per bool, same as Rust). There's no reason bool can't work with PyO3 — numpy::PyArray1<bool> exists. Add NpElement impl for bool, or separate AsFerrayBool/IntoNumPyBool traits.
